title: Caveman Villagers
description: This texture pack reskins all the villagers with caveman variants, made for a modpack I am working on for 1.20.1.
body:
This resource pack adds caveman villagers, it also replaces iron golems with big caveman villagers.

Only on 1.20.1 for now, may work on other versions, but the modpack I made this for is on 1.20.1.

All villager jobs are accounted for, witches & wandering traders too. I have not added pillagers yet but I might in the future
